structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Reheat Zone Endpoints by Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active airflow setpoint endpoints vary by Zone Group mode as defined in Table 5.6.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Group mode (Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling maximum endpoint is Vcool-max in Occupied/Cooldown/Setup, 0 otherwise. Cooling minimum endpoint is Vmin* in Occupied, 0 otherwise. Minimum endpoint is Vmin* in Occupied, 0 otherwise. Heating minimum endpoint is Max(Vheat-min, min*) in Occupied, Vheat-min in Cooldown, 0 in Setup, Vheat-max in Warmup/Setback, 0 in Unoccupied. Heating maximum endpoint is Max(Vheat-max, min*) in Occupied, Vheat-max in Cooldown, 0 in Setup, Vcool-max in Warmup/Setback, 0 in Unoccupied.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.6.4 Endpoints  as a Function of Zone Group  Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Cooling minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating minimum  Max
(Vheat -min, min*)  Vheat -min 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0
Heating maximum  Max
(Vheat -max, min*)  Vheat -max 0 Vcool -max Vcool -max 0
